nodes.title: Model link
widgets_values:
## Report workflow issue

If you found any issues when running this workflow, [report template issue here](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)


## Model links

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

**loras**

- [pixel_art_style_z_image_turbo.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/tarn59/pixel_art_style_lora_z_image_turbo/resolve/main/pixel_art_style_z_image_turbo.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors)

**vae**

- [ae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │      └── pixel_art_style_z_image_turbo.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── ae.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Prompt Constants
widgets_values:
USER_CONSTRAINTS:
style = messy bun
hair color = blonde
hair style = retain
age = retain
ethnicity = retain
skin color = retain
height = retain
background = retain
camera angle = retain
shirt = retain
Pants = retain
See nipples outline poking through shirt
censored value = retain
censored value = retain
censored value = retain

NSTRUCTION FOR QWEN3-VL:

You will receive two inputs:
1) USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
2) An image

Your task:
Generate a single, long, highly detailed Z-Image prompt.

Rules:

•⁠  ⁠All values in USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in the image. 
•⁠  If USER_CONSTRAINTS = "retain" you follow exactly the image!
•⁠  ⁠If USER_CONSTRAINTS does not specify a value for any of the following attributes: description, environment, outfit, pose, expression, lighting, textures, skin tone, setting, background, atmosphere, realism, lens, camera angle, mood, use the image as the source and follow this perfectly.
•⁠  ⁠Do not contradict USER_CONSTRAINTS.
•⁠  ⁠If the "style" value in USER_CONSTRAINTS is set, apply it as the global style.
•⁠  ⁠Output only the final Z-Image prompt as pure text (no lists, no sections, no code block).

Your Z-Image prompt must be extremely detailed and describe:
•⁠  ⁠the character (face, body shape, skin, details, imperfections)
•⁠  ⁠the character hair style and hair color
•⁠  ⁠clothing and materials
•⁠  ⁠background, environment, objects
•⁠  ⁠mood, ambiance, lighting, shadows
•⁠  ⁠camera angle, lens, depth of field, framing
•⁠  ⁠color palette, atmosphere, realism level
•⁠  ⁠textures and micro-details
•⁠  ⁠overall narrative vibe of the scene

Final instruction:
Combine the constraints from USER_CONSTRAINTS with the visual analysis into one unified, natural, flowing prompt formatted as a single paragraph.  USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in image.
A high-resolution portrait of Teegra tiger-humanoid, neutral expression, wearing a leather jacket, soft studio lighting, forest background.
